hero.body: Authorized BMW dealer since 1984. Experience the pinnacle of automotive engineering.

trust.title: Why BMWStore.id
trust.c1: 1st BMW dealership in Indonesia with more than 40 years experience. Since 1984.
trust.c2: Get Exclusive Offers at BMW Official Store. Contact us.
trust.c3: 100% Guaranteed Best Price and offers with Professional customer oriented staff — Best Customer Relationship BMW Indonesia Award.

finance.title: Finance Your Ultimate Driving Machine.
finance.body: BMW Financial Services is the Official Partner of BMW. Key business fields include loan financing and leasing of BMW automobiles for private and business customers, plus selected insurance products.
finance.note: *T&C applied. Contact us for more information.

simulasi.title: BMW Credit Simulation
simulasi.subtitle: Plan your dream BMW ownership with our credit simulation calculator. Get estimates for Down Payment (DP) and monthly installments.
simulasi.disclaimer: *This calculation is only a simulation. Actual figures may vary according to current interest rates and BMW Financial Services leasing insurance.

financial.title: Drive Today. Pay on Your Terms.
financial.body: Our customized financing solutions are designed to suit your specific financial requirements. From flexible leasing to tailored ownership plans.

promo.title: Current BMW Promotions
promo.subtitle: Exclusive offers available at BMW Store Indonesia. Limited time.

card1.title: Easy Installments Starting 0% Interest
card1.description: Get the best installment offer with 0% interest for up to 24 months. Valid for ready stock units.

card2.title: Free 3-Year Service Package
card2.description: Enjoy peace of mind with a comprehensive service package free for 3 years. Includes spare parts and routine service labor.

card3.title: Trade-In Special Rate
card3.description: Trade in your old car for your dream BMW. Transparent unit assessment with the best price offer in the automotive market.

card4.title: BMW Insurance Bundle
card4.description: Get exclusive All-Risk insurance protection with special premiums and guaranteed repairs at official BMW Authorized workshops.

referral.title: Earn Rewards with BMW Referral Program
referral.description: Refer a friend to BMW Store ID and receive exclusive loyalty benefits.

contactPage.title: Find Your BMW
contactPage.subtitle: Visit our authorized showroom in Jakarta or connect with our BMW Business Consultant instantly.

message.title: Send Message
message.subtitle: Our team will respond within 24 hours.

testdrive.title: Booking Test Drive
testdrive.description: Experience the sensation of driving a BMW directly. We prepare the unit and best route for you.
testdrive.locationNote: Our team can pick you up for the test drive.
